title: Terminnus Bricks
description: Adds a BRICKTON of new bricks
body:
This mod introduces four brand-new types of bricks to your Minecraft world! Perfect for building, these unique bricks bring more variety and texture to your constructions. Whether you’re building a majestic castle, a cozy house, or a grand cityscape, these bricks will give your builds a fresh and stylish look.

![The 4 new brick types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d9c17edd7b87c343adcfc7ba4e82262eda2d97.png)
